RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT AXA EQUITABLE LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY''''S Stipulated Motion For Order Discharging It From Liability And Dismissing It With Prejudice From This Action is continued to August 27, 2015 to give Moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B.
